name: the-motorcycle-diaries
description: Che Guevara's The Motorcycle Diaries — travel memoir toolkit exploring how a young medical student's journey across Latin America transformed him into a revolutionary through firsthand encounters with poverty and injustice
useCase: Understand Che's transformation, learn from his encounters with poverty, explore the power of transformative travel, and connect personal journey to political awakening
knownRisks: Che Guevara is a controversial figure — this book focuses on his early life and transformation, not his later revolutionary activities
The diaries were written by a 23-year-old — they are not a mature political manifesto
The book has been adapted and edited in various editions — some versions differ from Che's original journals
